case_title: COOL VENTURES, LLC vs. DE CARLO, DENNIS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOL VENTURES, LLC SERVED JAN-21-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE CARLO, DENNIS
